cedict_en: to resist/to boycott/to refuse (to cooperate)/to reject/resistance/refusal
to increase by degrees/in increasing order/incremental/progressive
to be jolted around (car on a bumpy road, boat on a rough sea, aircraft experiencing turbulence)/(fig.) to undergo a rough experience
to turn upside down/to reverse/back to front/confused/deranged/crazy
pad/cushion/mat/to pad out/to fill a gap/to pay for sb/to advance (money)
